news: Eli Lilly announced positive topline results from Phase 3 ACHIEVE-4 trial showing Foundayo (orforglipron) was non-inferior to insulin glargine in preventing cardiovascular events in patients with type 2 diabetes and obesity, with plans for label expansion by end of Q2.

changes.reason: Positive CV safety data and non-inferiority to insulin glargine significantly de-risks orforglipron and increases approval probability
Even in bear case, positive Phase 3 CV safety data substantially increases regulatory approval confidence
CV safety profile and planned label expansion filing by Q2 makes approval highly likely in bull scenario

news: Allogene priced 87.5M shares at $2.00 per share for $175M gross proceeds to fund clinical trials and R&D

changes.reason: Adding $175M gross proceeds from equity offering
87.5M new shares increase dilution from current 282.5M shares outstanding
